title: (Junior) Consultant Data & AI Strategy (m/w/d)
required_skills: Degree in BWL/VWL, Wirtschaftsinformatik, Data Science, Mathematics/Statistics, Engineering, or similar
First practical experience in consulting, strategy, analytics, data/AI, or transformation projects
Strong analytical thinking — structured presentation of complex topics
Entrepreneurial mindset, curiosity, and motivation for impact
Willingness to travel nationally and internationally
matched_skills: Business degree: Master of Management & Entrepreneurship from Leuphana University (strong match)
Transformation project experience: HSBC digital transformation programme (USD 8M) as PMO
Analytical thinking and structured presentation: executive-level reporting, data storytelling at HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd
Entrepreneurial mindset: business development at ECE Group, GTM strategy at IPC
Strategy and analytics work: competitive analysis at ECE Group, GTM market analysis at IPC and GRG
missing_skills: Data & AI specialisation (no data science, AI/ML, or advanced analytics technical skills)
Consulting firm experience (no management consulting background)
Very good German (B1 vs. required very good — meaningful gap)
Data architecture knowledge (Data Warehouse, Data Lake, Data Lakehouse)
Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud platform experience
AI tool proficiency for consulting (beyond general ChatGPT/Claude usage)
core_responsibilities: Work in project teams on transformation of organisations and business models with Data & AI
Develop Data & AI strategies, roadmaps, and value cases with focus on business impact and ROI
Translate business questions into concrete analytics and AI use cases
Support building Data & AI target operating models and governance
Accompany change, enablement, and capability-building initiatives
Analyse findings, prepare executive-ready presentations, support proposals and client acquisition
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Master of Management & Entrepreneurship from Leuphana as matching the degree requirement
Frame HSBC digital transformation programme involvement as transformation consulting experience
Lead with data storytelling and executive-level analytical reporting as evidence of structured analytical thinking
Be honest about the German language gap (B1 vs. required very good) and the absence of Data/AI technical background
summary: Match score 30.0% — weak match. The candidate has a relevant management degree, business analytical skills, and transformation programme exposure, but lacks the core Data & AI technical specialisation that defines this consulting role. Very good German is required and B1 is a notable gap. The junior level makes this more accessible than senior roles, but the data/AI technical foundation gap and language requirement make it a weak fit. Marginal application case — only if the candidate is genuinely interested in pivoting toward Data & AI strategy.
